versions.change_log: Added a check to see if a crafting table already exists before placing one, similar to the furnace check. Previously, the code unconditionally called placeCraftingTable(), which might have placed a new crafting table unnecessarily. Now it uses bot.findBlock() to check for an existing crafting table and only places one if not found, at coordinates (30,117,3).

nodes.name: mineRedstoneDust
craftRedstoneTorch
craftRedstoneBlock

versions.change_log: The placement logic for the crafting table has been significantly improved. Instead of calling a generic 'placeCraftingTable(bot)' function, the new code directly handles placement by: 1) calculating safe positions around the bot, 2) checking if each position is air, and 3) attempting to place the crafting table at the first valid position using 'placeItem(bot, 'crafting_table', pos)'. Additionally, error handling for placement has been enhanced with per-position try/catch and a final check if placement succeeded. The wait delay and crafting logic remain otherwise similar.

nodes.name: craftDiamondSword
craftJukebox
craftHopper

versions.change_log: The core logic changed: the new code now directly crafts a hopper using craftItem() instead of calling craftRedstoneBlock(), and adds specific error handling with inventory checks for required materials (5 iron ingots and a chest) when crafting fails.

craftCopperBlock

versions.change_log: Removed the call to `await craftRedstoneBlock(bot)` at the end of the function, so the function now only crafts a copper block and no longer triggers crafting of a redstone block.
